clues: Files deleted from the computer disappear but the Recycle Bin shows no contents.
The Recycle Bin icon always appears empty even after deleting large files.
Right-clicking the Recycle Bin and selecting 'Empty Recycle Bin' produces no result.
Command prompt operations that require deleting files give unexpected access denied errors.
The Recycle Bin's underlying system directory on the drive appears to have a corrupted index.
